title: Nicky Hill

infobox.value: This biographical article related to association football in England, about a defender born in the 1980s, is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Nicky_Hill&action=edit).

(born 26 February 1981) in [Accrington](/wiki/Accrington "Accrington"), England, is an English retired professional [footballer](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") who played as a defender for [Bury](/wiki/Bury_F.C. "Bury F.C.") in [the Football League](/wiki/The_Football_League "The Football League").

**Nicky Hill** (born 26 February 1981) in [Accrington](/wiki/Accrington "Accrington"), England, is an English retired professional [footballer](/wiki/Association_football "Association football") who played as a defender for [Bury](/wiki/Bury_F.C. "Bury F.C.") in [the Football League](/wiki/The_Football_League "The Football League").
